data.title: CZ: If the $4.4 million BNB Chain Meme Coin liquidity support plan works well, the duration will be extended
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Binance founder CZ Yu X platform quoted "BNB Chain launches up to $4.4 million in first phase Meme coin liquidity support plan" related tweets: "The team worked until 3 am to announce this. A lot of details were discussed. If the effect is good, we may even extend the activity for a few more weeks."

data.title: Ancient Bitcoin Whale Comes Back With $30 Million in BTC After 11 Years' Sleep
data.description:
Dormant Bitcoin whale reactivated with millions worth of BTC
source: https://u.today/ancient-bitcoin-whale-comes-back-with-30-million-in-btc-after-11-years-sleep

data.title: A whale liquidated 3,000 ETH and made a profit of $348,000
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to on-chain data analyst @ai_9684xtpa, a whale who built a position of 3,000 ETH at an average price of $2,615 two weeks ago liquidated all ETH 5 hours ago and made a profit of $348,000.

data.title: AscendEX is about to launch Brat (BRAT)
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News AscendEX (formerly BitMax) will launch Brat (BRAT) at 18:00 on February 15, opening the BRAT/USDT trading pair, and recharge is now open.
AscendEX (formerly BitMax) is the leading and comprehensive trading platform for Memecoin on the entire network. The Meme Research Institute team under the platform selects high-quality Memes for listing based on on-chain data and project background. The platform's Memecoin first launch rate is as high as 80%.

data.title: KIP Protocol Co-founder's latest response: The previous statement was inappropriately worded, but it will not be deleted to show transparency
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Julian, co-founder of KIP Protocol, quoted the official post of KIP Protocol on the X platform: "This tweet is inappropriately worded. There are reasons for doing this (LIBRA project). But we will not delete it to maintain full transparency."

data.title: Ethereum Whale Sells Holdings for Significant Profit
data.description: According to PANews, a notable Ethereum investor, who had acquired 3,000 ETH at $2,615 each two weeks ago, has recently sold all their holdings. This transaction, monitored by on-chain analyst @ai_9684xtpa, resulted in a profit of $348,000. The sale occurred five hours prior to the report.

data.title: Coinbase vs SEC: Legal Case Paused as Crypto Task Force Reshapes Regulation
data.description:
The post Coinbase vs SEC: Legal Case Paused as Crypto Task Force Reshapes Regulation appeared first on Coinpedia Fintech News
Would the newly formed Crypto Task Force prompt the US Securities and Exchange Commission to make a radical shift in its approach towards cryptocurrency regulation? Recent developments in the SEC’s legal battles against prominent exchanges like Coinbase and Binance...
source: https://coinpedia.org/news/coinbase-vs-sec-legal-case-paused-as-crypto-task-force-reshapes-regulation/

data.title: KIP Protocol co-founder responded to Solayer team members’ box opening behavior: Come to me, LIBRA is not a scam
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: In response to the "box opening" behavior of Solayer team member Chaofan Shou against KIP Protocol team members, KIP Protocol co-founder Julian responded: "Come to me. This is no rug. If it was a scam, we wouldn't have received so much support for the launch. Just because you lost money doesn't mean it's a scam." In response, Solayer team member Chaofan Shou replied, "The LIBRA incident is a scam, and I will find every one of you. From Vietnam to Singapore to the United States. You are in trouble."
